ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the season started */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the season ended */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league */,
  "is_playoffs" INTEGER /* Indicates if the season includes playoffs */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional details about the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playoffs" (
  "playoff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playoff participation */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "playoff_round" TEXT /* Round of the playoffs the team reached */,
  "finals_appearance" INTEGER /* Indicates if the team reached the finals */,
  "win_loss_record" TEXT /* Team's win/loss record in the playoffs */,
  "championship" INTEGER /* Indicates if the team won the championship */,
  "playoff_rank" TEXT /* Team's final ranking in the playoffs */,
  "coaches_trophy" INTEGER /* Indicates if the team won the coach's trophy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playoff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoffs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoffs_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (Win/Loss) */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Indicates if the game was played at home or away */,
  "score_team" INTEGER /* Score of the team */,
  "score_opponent" INTEGER /* Score of the opponent */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game went into overtime */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins during the season */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored during the season */,
  "points_allowed" INTEGER /* Total points allowed during the season */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Total field goals made during the season */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Total field goals attempted during the season */,
  "two_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Total two-pointers made during the season */,
  "two_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Total two-pointers attempted during the season */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Total three-pointers made during the season */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Total three-pointers attempted during the season */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Total free throws made during the season */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Total free throws attempted during the season */,
  "offensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Total offensive rebounds during the season */,
  "defensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Total defensive rebounds during the season */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists during the season */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals during the season */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks during the season */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers during the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played */,
  "effective_field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Effective field goal percentage */,
  "true_shooting_percentage" REAL /* True shooting percentage */,
  "offensive_rating" REAL /* Offensive rating */,
  "defensive_rating" REAL /* Defensive rating */,
  "pace" REAL /* Pace */,
  "plus_minus" REAL /* Net rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the team */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that drafted the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the player */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the player (active, retired, etc.) */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL of the player's profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_draft_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("draft_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored during the season */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds during the season */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists during the season */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals during the season */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks during the season */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers during the season */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage during the season */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage during the season */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage during the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player */,
  "true_shooting_percentage" REAL /* True shooting percentage */,
  "offensive_rating" REAL /* Offensive rating */,
  "defensive_rating" REAL /* Defensive rating */,
  "pace" REAL /* Pace */,
  "plus_minus" REAL /* Net rating */,
  "doubles" INTEGER /* Number of double-doubles */,
  "triple_doubles" INTEGER /* Number of triple-doubles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (active, inactive, etc.) */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)
